overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a circular Gothic-style divination classroom from a video game, featuring stone walls, red velvet curtains, glowing crystal balls on tables, and warm candlelight. The scene includes a stationary robed figure and a brief appearance of a walking character crossing the room.

decorative patterned rug covering the center floor area

segments.scene_description: A student character enters from the left and walks across the center of the divination classroom, passing the crystal ball tables before exiting to the right. The robed figure remains stationary throughout the crossing, and the camera maintains its fixed position.

segments.scene_description: The classroom returns to its initial static state with only the robed figure remaining near the fireplace. The crystal balls continue to glow softly, and the warm candlelight maintains the mystical atmosphere until the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a Gothic divination classroom that remains constant as a single figure briefly disrupts the stillness. It begins with a wide view of the circular stone room, where glowing crystal balls and warm candlelight contrast with the blue daylight filtering through a stained glass window. As the scene unfolds, a student character enters from the left and walks across the center of the room, passing the mystical tables while a robed figure stands motionless by the fireplace. The movement then subsides as the student exits to the right, returning the environment to its initial state of quietude. Finally, the camera lingers on the solitary robed figure and the softly glowing crystals, maintaining the mystical atmosphere until the end.
